lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Greetings, fellow hunter. How can I be of help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kinds of food and drink do you serve?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: In terms of drinks, we've got a Trapper's Tipple, and for food, a simple hearty stew.

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: But you don't have room to hold either of them, so you'll have to come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Couldn't you just leave it on the ground for me?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: We don't tend to just... leave things like that around here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd love a Trapper's Tipple!

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: That'll be three coins then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I can't afford one right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I grab a stew?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Absolutely! They're 20 coins these days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I can't afford that right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about rumours?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Looks like you could do with talking to Verity first, given you're new to this whole business.

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Yes, yes. How can I help you on that front?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any new ones for me?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Could you check out the validity of this report for me? Someone thinks they've seen a [creature]. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: There's been rumours of a rare [creature] coming in. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: We've got reports of a slightly different [creature] in the local population. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Looks like we need some information on a unique specimen amongst the local [creature] population. Once you find it, bring back some of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: I've heard rumours of a strange [creature] that you could check out for me. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Another one done? You're really doing a lot for the guild.

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Are you up for another?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: Thanks for that. I'll mark off that report for you. Would you like another rumour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remind me which rumour I'm chasing right now?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: You're hunting for me at the moment. This rumour was about a [creature]. You'll need to bring back some of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: I can see you're following [Guild Hunter]'s rumour looking for a [creature] at the moment. You'll need to bring back some of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: I seem to remember sending you off to hunt a [creature] and bring back one of its [rare parts]. Would you prefer that one, or a new one entirely?

lines.speaker: Huntmaster Gilman (Novice)
lines.text: That was it. I asked you to hunt a [creature] and bring back one of its [rare parts]. Best of luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.
